prompt: What's the current price of AirPods Pro (2nd generation) on Amazon? Just give me the price and product title — nothing else.

assertions.name: uses_nimble_extract
assertions.description: The agent ran nimble extract with an Amazon URL

assertions.name: contains_price
assertions.description: The output contains a dollar amount (price)

assertions.name: contains_product_title
assertions.description: The output contains 'AirPods' in the product name

assertions.name: no_curl_or_requests
assertions.description: The agent did not use curl, wget, requests, or WebFetch to get the data
